info.title: ASEP Engine
info.description: AI engine for the ASEP platform: chat, agents, repository intelligence.

schema.title: Response List Conversations V1 Conversations Get
Response List Messages V1 Conversations  Conversation Id  Messages Get
Response List Runs V1 Runs Get

post.description: The human approval gate: approve starts the work, reject ends the run.

get.description: Everything the agents changed in the run's workspace since its base commit.

schema.title: Response List Events V1 Runs  Run Id  Events Get

get.description:
Live timeline: push each event as it lands, close when the run ends.
Postgres is the record, Redis only wakes the stream — a missed ping costs
one heartbeat of latency, never an event (RUN_EVENT_STREAMING.md).

Each message carries its event id, so a reconnecting EventSource resumes
from Last-Event-ID; the `after` query parameter seeds a fresh start.

post.description: Set each item's board position from its index in `ordered_ids`.

post.description: Scrum Master: turn a one-line goal into work items saved to the backlog.

schema.title: Response Generate Repository Roadmap V1 Repositories  Repository Id  Roadmap Post

get.description: Blocked items and the recommended next item — computed, never stored.
Newest memories first; with `q`, the hybrid-recall ranking instead.

schema.title: Response List Knowledge V1 Repositories  Repository Id  Knowledge Get

delete.description: Memories that turn out to be wrong are deleted, not argued with.

Estimate.title: Estimate
Estimate.description: Relative size only — never a false-precision hour count.

KnowledgeItemIn.title: KnowledgeItemIn
KnowledgeItemIn.description:
A hand-written memory. Decisions and outcomes are captured automatically
by runs; the page adds notes and preferences (and corrections as notes).

WorkItemUpdate.title: WorkItemUpdate
WorkItemUpdate.description: Every field optional; only the fields sent are changed (partial update).
